description_long: This object consists of a group of whole and halved citrus fruits, specifically oranges and blood oranges, arranged in a loose cluster. The whole fruits have a smooth, slightly glossy orange skin with subtle dimpling, typical of fresh oranges. The halved fruits reveal a vibrant, juicy interior with segments radiating from the center, some displaying the deep red flesh characteristic of blood oranges. The cut surfaces are moist and glistening, with visible pulp and thin membranes separating the segments. The overall size of the fruits varies, with some being larger and others smaller, suggesting a natural assortment. The colors range from bright orange to deep red, creating a visually appealing and realistic representation of fresh citrus.
description: A cluster of whole and halved oranges and blood oranges, showing smooth orange skins and juicy, segmented interiors with vibrant orange and red hues.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full assortment of whole and halved oranges, with the interiors of the cut fruits prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the roundness of the whole oranges and the angled presentation of the halved fruits, with less emphasis on the interiors.
description_view_2: Rear view primarily shows the backs of the whole oranges, with only a small portion of a halved fruit visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the cluster from another angle, with both whole and halved fruits visible but less focus on the interiors.
attribute_location_or_placement: outdoor market stall, park picnic table, street vendor cart
